title: ficus subglabra
intro: Ficus subglabra, also known as the smooth-leafed fig, is a plant species belonging to the fig family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. Ficus subglabra has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and providing relief from digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
